title: phyllanthus niruri var. scabrellus
intro: Phyllanthus niruri var. scabrellus is a lesser-known variety of the Phyllanthus niruri plant, also known as Chanca piedra, a small tropical plant that grows in Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niruri var. scabrellus include the relief of kidney stones, treatment of urinary tract infections, and management of liver and gallbladder disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, capsules, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
